Cloud Security Lead

Location: New York, NY
Department: Information Security
Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are looking for a Cloud Security Lead to join our Information Security team. You will be responsible for developing and implementing security strategies for our cloud infrastructure and AI/ML workloads.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop comprehensive cloud security strategies, policies, and standards
- Build security control frameworks and reference architectures
- Conduct threat modeling exercises to identify risks in cloud and AI systems
- Perform security assessments on cloud applications and AI systems
- Develop hardening guidelines for cloud AI services
- Ensure compliance with security regulations and standards
- Provide thought leadership on cloud and AI security governance

Required Qualifications

- 10+ years information security experience with cloud focus
- 5+ years software engineering experience
- Strong understanding of AI/ML security concepts including OWASP LLM Top 10
- Security architecture assessment experience (Web, Mobile, APIs, Cloud)
- Experience developing reference security architectures
- Knowledge of security standards (NIST, CIS, PCI DSS)
- Proficiency in Python, JavaScript
- Strong communication skills

Preferred Qualifications

- AWS Certified Security Specialty or equivalent
- Experience with AI/ML cloud services (SageMaker, Bedrock, Azure AI)
- MITRE ATLAS framework knowledge
- Experience with threat modeling methodologies
- Background in financial services security

Benefits

Competitive salary, health coverage, flexible time off, continuous learning resources.
